summary: Comprehensive testing of 4 new features completed. Backend: 17/17 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All new features working correctly with proper integration.
critical_code_review_comments: ✓ Grade filtering: Backend correctly filters subjects by grade_level, frontend chips work perfectly
✓ User settings: PUT /api/user/grade and PUT /api/user/notifications persist correctly
✓ Classes: Full CRUD working - create, join, get, detail, share deck, study shared deck
✓ Export/Import: GET /api/export returns proper JSON format, POST /api/import validates and imports cards
✓ Frontend grade filter chips integrate with backend API seamlessly
✓ Profile grade selector updates user preference and reflects on home screen
✓ Classes tab properly integrated in bottom navigation with 3 tabs (Accueil, Classe, Profil)
✓ Export button on each subject card, import button on home screen
✓ Study session works with grade filtering (philosophie loads for terminale users)
✓ All new endpoints follow existing auth patterns with JWT Bearer tokens
✓ MongoDB ObjectId properly excluded from all responses
✓ All new UI elements have proper testID attributes for testing
seed_data_creation: No additional seed data created. Existing seed data includes grade_levels per flashcard.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 4 new features fully functional: 1) Grade level filtering with chips on home and selector in profile, 2) Notification toggle with expo-notifications, 3) Class mode with create/join/share decks and new Classe tab, 4) Export/Import via clipboard. Backend APIs all passing. Frontend UI elements present and integrated. Study session works with grade filtering.

backend_apis: GET /api/subjects - No filter returns all subjects ✓
frontend_flows: Home screen displays grade filter chips (6ème through Term.) ✓
Grade filter correctly hides philosophie for 6ème ✓
Export button visible on each subject card ✓
Import deck button visible on home screen ✓
Profile screen shows grade level selector (Tous, 6ème...Terminale) ✓
Profile screen shows notification toggle switch ✓
Selecting grade in profile updates user preference ✓
Grade selection persists and reflects on home screen ✓
Classe tab visible in bottom navigation ✓
Classes screen shows create and join buttons ✓
Create class form works and shows class with code ✓
Join class form accepts code input ✓
Class cards display with member count and deck count ✓
Study session loads with grade filtering (philosophie for terminale) ✓

grade_level_filtering.backend: GET /api/subjects?grade=X filters correctly, returns grade_levels array
grade_level_filtering.frontend: Grade chips on home screen, selector in profile, filtering works correctly
grade_level_filtering.integration: User grade preference persists and auto-applies filter on home screen

streak_notifications.frontend: Toggle switch in profile, uses expo-notifications for scheduling
streak_notifications.integration: Settings persist in user document, notification scheduled at 18h daily

class_mode.backend: Full CRUD: create class with 6-char code, join with code, share decks, study shared decks
class_mode.frontend: New Classe tab in bottom nav, create/join forms, class cards with codes
class_mode.integration: Classes created successfully, codes displayed, members tracked, decks shareable

export_import.backend: GET /api/export returns JSON with version, subject, cards, grade_levels. POST /api/import validates and inserts
export_import.frontend: Export button on each subject card, import button on home, uses expo-clipboard
export_import.integration: Export copies JSON to clipboard, import reads from clipboard and creates cards
